scripts.sync:web: cd ../Skisterapp && npm run build && rm -rf ../Skister-main/dist && cp -R dist ../Skister-main/
scripts.supabase:deploy: cp supabase/functions/server/index.tsx supabase/functions/make-server-080ebf84/index.tsx && cp supabase/functions/server/kv_store.tsx supabase/functions/make-server-080ebf84/kv_store.tsx && cp supabase/functions/make-server-080ebf84/index.tsx supabase/functions/make-server-080ebf84/index.ts && supabase functions deploy make-server-080ebf84 --no-verify-jwt
